title: Clownunity Teeth And Tenderness
description: ClownUnity - Teeth and Tenderness is a heart‑opening clown performance that celebrates human connection in a post‑truth world. It’s a show that combines bite and softness, truth and absurdity, vulnerability and joy. This performance is made possible by the Brighton Fringe Community Award 2024, awarded for #LewesCurious events and continues the pay‑it‑forward chain of community creativity — one offering making space for the next - each step opening the door for more joy, play, and collective imagination. This is not a polished product. This is a communal ritual of presence, play, and connection, remembering we all belong.
